signals: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.5 con enfoque nativo en agentes autónomos y razonamiento de tareas complejas.
NVIDIA logra una aceleración masiva en MLPerf reduciendo tiempos de entrenamiento de 8 horas a 80 segundos.
Google DeepMind presenta DiLoCo para permitir el entrenamiento de modelos de IA entre múltiples centros de datos.
Anthropic inicia pruebas de agentes económicos con Claude negociando en mercados internos de empleados.
La computación óptica de Lumai emerge como una solución de hardware disruptiva para la eficiencia en datacenters.
risks: Dependencia crítica de hardware de ultra alto rendimiento para mantener la competitividad en tiempos de entrenamiento.
Riesgos éticos y operativos en la delegación de decisiones económicas a agentes autónomos como Claude.
Complejidad técnica en la implementación de arquitecturas de entrenamiento distribuido geográficamente.
watch: Rendimiento real de GPT-5.5 Pro en la ejecución de flujos de trabajo de ingeniería complejos.
Adopción de Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 en la industria de la robótica autónoma y espacial.
Impacto del Plan de Acción Conjunta de la UE en la descentralización de la innovación tecnológica.

items.title: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API.
items.summary: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API.
items.raw_title: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Quote OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs Apr 24 GPT-5.5 is now available in the API. The model bring...
items.raw_summary: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Quote OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs Apr 24 GPT-5.5 is now available in the API. The model brings higher intelligence and stronger token efficiency to complex work, helping tasks get done with fewer retries. x.com/16338749515087… Today we’re introducing two big steps for health at OpenAI: - ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free version of ChatGPT designed for clinical work - HealthBench Professional, a new benchmark to evaluate real clinician chat tasks We’re excited about what this can unlock for care. ![Image 5: ❤️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/2764.svg)
items.why: El lanzamiento de GPT-5.5 marca un salto generacional en capacidades de razonamiento y uso de APIs para agentes.

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5 A new class of intelligence for real work and powering agents, built to understand complex goals, use tools, check its work, and carry mo...
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5 A new class of intelligence for real work and powering agents, built to understand complex goals, use tools, check its work, and carry more tasks through to completion. It marks a new way of getting computer work done. Now available in ChatGPT and Codex.

items.raw_summary: Introducing GPT-5.5 A new class of intelligence for real work and powering agents, built to understand complex goals, use tools, check its work, and carry more tasks through to completion. It marks a new way of getting computer work done. Now available in ChatGPT and Codex.
items.why: GPT-5.5 introduce una nueva clase de inteligencia diseñada específicamente para la ejecución de tareas y uso de herramientas.

items.raw_summary: New Anthropic research: Project Deal. We created a marketplace for employees in our San Francisco office, with one big twist. We tasked Claude with buying, selling and negotiating on our colleagues’ behalf.
items.why: Project Deal demuestra la capacidad de los LLM para actuar como agentes económicos autónomos en negociaciones reales.

items.summary: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. 🕹️ His epiphany that software could act on our behalf remains at the heart of our work today as we apply the same logic to solving scientific grand challenges. items.raw_title: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. ![Image 5: 🕹️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f579.svg) His epiphany that...
items.raw_summary: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. ![Image 5: 🕹️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f579.svg) His epiphany that software could act on our behalf remains at the heart of our work today as we apply the same logic to solving scientific grand challenges. Read more on Gemini Embedding 2 is now generally available in the Gemini API and Vertex AI! Start building with our first natively multimodal embedding model, now equipped with the stability and optimizations required for production apps.
items.why: La disponibilidad general de Gemini Embedding 2 permite procesar datos multimodales con estabilidad para producción.

items.title: CEO Interview with Xianxin Guo of Lumai
items.summary: Xianxin is the CEO and Co-Founder of Lumai, an Oxford University spin-out pioneering disruptive optical computing technologies for Al and data center acceleration. He brings over 15 years of experience in physics and engineering, and was previously an RCE 1851 Research Fellow, a prestigious fellowship whose past awardees &8230; Read More The post CEO Interview with Xianxin Guo of Lumai appeared first on SemiWiki .
